title: Sweet Mellow Kenyan Wrap
description: A fusion of the sweetness of molasses and mellow flavors, wrapped in a Kenyan-inspired sweet potato wrap.
instructions: 2. Pierce the sweet potatoes several times with a fork and bake for 45-50 minutes, or until tender.
3. In a pan over medium heat, warm the Kenyan wrap for 2-3 minutes.
4. Spread the molasses on the center of the wrap.
5. Slice the baked sweet potatoes and place on top of the molasses.
6. Sprinkle mellow and sweet spices over the sweet potatoes.
7. Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling.
